case_title: CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE VS. CLAUDIA GONZALEZ

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,226.20 FILED BY CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, CLAUDIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-08-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER TO DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF REQUEST. PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ANGELA COOPER SR. COLLECTIONS OFFICER. DEFENDANT CLAUDIA GONZALEZ IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF INFORMED THE COURT THAT SETTLEMENT HAS BEEN SATISFIED AND REQUESTS TO DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: AARON GRUBER; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
